zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wettenhall III於1295年6月1日出生在英國爾阿克頓時，他的父親Baron John Wettenhall, I31歲，母親Margred ferch Gruffudd28歲。他於1319年與Maude Fulleshurst在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1348年在英國爾維頓哈爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wettenhall III于1295年6月1日出生在英国爾阿克頓时，他的父亲Baron John Wettenhall, I31岁，母亲Margred ferch Gruffudd28岁。他于1319年与Maude Fulleshurst在英国爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1348年在英国爾維頓哈爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wettenhall III was born on 1 June 1295, in Acton, Cheshire, England, his father, Baron John Wettenhall, I, was 31 and his mother, Margred ferch Gruffudd, was 28. He married Maude Fulleshurst in 1319, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1348, in Wettenhall, Cheshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Wales: Griffithstown, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wettenhall III est né le 1 juin 1295, à Acton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Baron John Wettenhall, I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margred ferch Gruffudd, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Maude Fulleshurst en 1319, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1348, à Wettenhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wettenhall III am 1. Juni 1295 in Acton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron John Wettenhall, I 31 und seine Mutter Margred ferch Gruffudd 28. Er hat 1319 in Cheshire, England Maude Fulleshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1348 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wettenhall, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wettenhall III è nato il il 1 giugno 1295 nel Acton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Baron John Wettenhall, I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margred ferch Gruffudd, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Maude Fulleshurst nel 1319, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1348, nel Wettenhall, Cheshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wettenhall IIIが1295年6月1日にイギリスチェシュアイアアクトンで生まれた時，父Baron John Wettenhall, Iは31歳，母Margred ferch Gruffuddは28歳であった。1319年にイギリスチェシュアイアでMaude Fulleshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1348年にイギリスチェシュアイアウエッテンハルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wettenhall III(이)가 1295년 6월 1일 영국 체실르 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron John Wettenhall, I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred ferch Gruffudd(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1319년 영국 체실르에서 Maude Fulleshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1348년 영국 체실르 베텐홀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wettenhall III родился 1 июня 1295 г. в местности актон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron John Wettenhall, I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margred ferch Gruffudd, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude Fulleshurst в 1319 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1348 г. в местности веттенолл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wettenhall III nació el 1 de junio de 1295, en Acton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron John Wettenhall, I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margred ferch Gruffudd, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Maude Fulleshurst en 1319, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1348, en Wettenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
